title: Golden braai potatoes – njam,njam, njmmmmmmmm
excerpt: Look, I could hang myself on a potato. Food without potatoes is barely food to me. Braai potatoes are the king of all potatoes. Getting them golden brown is not difficult at all. 6 potatoes 250ml oil (just sunflower oil) coarse salt NOW: choose yourself 6 potatoes and peel them …

seo.title: Golden braai potatoes - njam,njam, njmmmmmmmm - Marinda Kook

html:
Look, I could hang myself on a potato. Food without potatoes is barely food to me. Braai potatoes are the king of all potatoes. Getting them golden brown is not difficult at all.

  • 6 potatoes
  • 250ml oil (just sunflower oil)
  • coarse salt

NOW:

  1. choose yourself 6 potatoes and peel them
  2. cut them in half and cook for 10 minutes on the stove.
  3. if you press in the tip of a sharp little knife, it should just barely go in.
  4. drain the water off and make sure the potatoes are dry.
  5. scrape the potatoes with a fork (as if they're a bit rough)
  6. put oil in the bottom of an oven dish and put the potatoes in the oil.
  7. bake for 30 minutes at 200 degrees Celsius.
  8. turn the potatoes over and bake for another 30 minutes or until golden brown.
  9. drain on kitchen paper and sprinkle salt over – preferably coarse salt.

Now I officially give you permission to overindulge.
